name: Take Hirako
description:
__Species:__ Human
__Height:__ 172 cm
__Affiliations:__ CCG
__Quinque:__ Nagomi 1/3 (Rinkaku)

Take Hirako is a First Class Ghoul Investigator. In the past, he formed a duo with Kishou Arima.

Hirako is of average height and his facial features have been described as "plain" or "bland." He usually has a blank expression on his face. Like all members of CCG, he usually wears formal attire.

Like his mentor Kishou Arima, Hirako has a very calm personality and has inherited the same cold and calculating approach to fighting ghouls.He is skilled to the point of being able to suppress a S-class Ukaku type ghoul.
